queries.question: Show me the image names that are common to all pieces
queries.sql: SELECT Images.image_name  from Photojournalism_Pieces_Images join Images on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id = Images.id join Photojournalism_Pieces on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id = Photojournalism_Pieces.id   GROUP BY Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photojournalism_Pieces)

queries.question: Show me image names and descriptions each photojournalism piece uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Images.image_name, Images.description  from Photojournalism_Pieces_Images join Images on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id = Images.id join Photojournalism_Pieces on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id = Photojournalism_Pieces.id   GROUP BY Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photojournalism_Pieces)

queries.question: Show me image names and descriptions each photojournalism piece uses.
queries.sql: select photojournalism_pieces.title , images.image_name , images.description from Photojournalism_Pieces_Images join Images on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id = Images.id join Photojournalism_Pieces on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id = Photojournalism_Pieces.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?image_name ?description WHERE {
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images a :Photojournalism_Pieces_Images .
  ?images a :Images .
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images p:hasImages ?images .
  ?photojournalism_pieces a :Photojournalism_Pieces .
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images p:hasPhotojournalism_Pieces ?photojournalism_pieces .
  ?photojournalism_pieces p:title ?title .
  ?images p:image_name ?image_name .
  ?images p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every piece, show me the image names it contains
queries.sql: select photojournalism_pieces.title , images.image_name from Photojournalism_Pieces_Images join Images on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.image_id = Images.id join Photojournalism_Pieces on Photojournalism_Pieces_Images.photojournalism_piece_id = Photojournalism_Pieces.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?image_name WHERE {
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images a :Photojournalism_Pieces_Images .
  ?images a :Images .
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images p:hasImages ?images .
  ?photojournalism_pieces a :Photojournalism_Pieces .
  ?photojournalism_pieces_images p:hasPhotojournalism_Pieces ?photojournalism_pieces .
  ?photojournalism_pieces p:title ?title .
  ?images p:image_name ?image_name .
}
